hooks.command: mkdir -p workspace/thread-outputs/sessions && echo "Session started: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" >> workspace/thread-outputs/sessions/session-log.txt && echo '{"systemMessage":"MANDATORY SESSION RULES — Read .claude/CLAUDE.md NOW if not already loaded. NEVER destroy uncommitted work. NEVER run destructive git commands. Match this session to the correct work stream (multiple run in parallel). Skills: /thread /pm /research /design /build /iterate /dispatch /agent-brief /diagnose — full instructions in ai-tools/ai-skills/*/SKILL.md. Explore before executing — first actions in any session should be Read/Grep/Glob to understand the problem. No Write/Edit until you understand what you are changing and why. Think freely, gate on execution. Findings before fixes. UK English. No em dashes. After 2 failures STOP and root-cause analyse. Confirm TEMPLATE vs PAGE before editing docs files. After file moves scan ALL file types for stale refs (.txt .json sitemap llms.txt). New scripts: 11-tag JSDoc + type/concern/niche. New components: 7-tag JSDoc + category. No destructive ops without backup. NEVER claim done without verifying renders/runs. At session end write outcome to workspace/thread-outputs/sessions/session-log.txt. Offer to commit after completing work."}'
